display_text: Riftshadow Prism, Tier 5: Neutral item creating a full health illusion at the cost of 10% of your current HP. The illusion deals 50% outgoing damage and takes 240% incoming damage, lasting 20 seconds. Used to create decoys, tank damage, or push lanes. Stats: CD: 30s, Duration: 20s, Health Cost: 10% Current HP.
